heading: Property in which the decedent had an interest
label: 2033 Property in which the decedent had an interest
text: The value of the gross estate shall include the value of all property to the extent of the interest therein of the decedent at the time of his death.
notes: Amendments1962— struck out provisions which excepted real property situated outside of the United States.Pub. L. 87–834

Effective Date of 1962 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to estates of decedents dying after , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 87–834section 18(b) of Pub. L. 87–834section 2031 of this titleOct. 16, 1962
